name: Do I need a developer to use AE Optimizer?

mainEntity.name: Do I need a developer to use AE Optimizer?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, AE Optimizer is designed to be used without a developer. It provides step-by-step tutorials, and the generated files are ready to simply upload to your website's root directory.

description: No, AE Optimizer is designed to be used without a developer. It provides step-by-step tutorials, and the generated files are ready to simply upload to your webs
